files.description: Main entry point for the FastAPI application.
files.content:
from fastapi import FastAPI
from app.routers import users, todos
from app.database import engine, Base

Base.metadata.create_all(bind=engine)

app = FastAPI()

app.include_router(users.router, prefix="/api/v1/users", tags=["users"])
app.include_router(todos.router, prefix="/api/v1/todos", tags=["todos"])

from sqlalchemy import create_engine
from sqlalchemy.ext.declarative import declarative_base
from sqlalchemy.orm import sessionmaker
import os

SQLALCHEMY_DATABASE_URL = os.getenv("DATABASE_URL", "postgresql://user:password@localhost/todoapp")

engine = create_engine(SQLALCHEMY_DATABASE_URL)
SessionLocal = sessionmaker(autocommit=False, autoflush=False, bind=engine)
Base = declarative_base()

files.description: Database models for users and todos.
files.content:
from sqlalchemy import Column, Integer, String, ForeignKey
from sqlalchemy.orm import relationship
from app.database import Base
from passlib.context import CryptContext

cpwd_context = CryptContext(schemes=["bcrypt"], deprecated="auto")

class User(Base):
    __tablename__ = "users"
    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True, index=True)
    email = Column(String, unique=True, index=True)
    hashed_password = Column(String)
    todos = relationship("Todo", back_populates="owner")

class Todo(Base):
    __tablename__ = "todos"
    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True, index=True)
    title = Column(String, index=True)
    description = Column(String, index=True)
    owner_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey("users.id"))
    owner = relationship("User", back_populates="todos")

from fastapi import Depends, HTTPException, status
from fastapi.security import OAuth2PasswordBearer
from jose import JWTError, jwt
from sqlalchemy.orm import Session
from app import models, database

SECRET_KEY = "your_secret_key"
ALGORITHM = "HS256"
OAUTH2_SCHEME = OAuth2PasswordBearer(tokenUrl="token")

def get_db():
    db = database.SessionLocal()
    try:
        yield db
    finally:
        db.close()

def get_current_user(token: str = Depends(OAUTH2_SCHEME), db: Session = Depends(get_db)):
    credentials_exception = HTTPException(
        status_code=status.HTTP_401_UNAUTHORIZED,
        detail="Could not validate credentials",
        headers={"WWW-Authenticate": "Bearer"},
    )
    try:
        payload = jwt.decode(token, SECRET_KEY, algorithms=[ALGORITHM])
        email: str = payload.get("sub")
        if email is None:
            raise credentials_exception
    except JWTError:
        raise credentials_exception
    user = db.query(models.User).filter(models.User.email == email).first()
    if user is None:
        raise credentials_exception
    return user

test_files.content:
from fastapi.testclient import TestClient
from app.main import app
from app.database import Base, engine
from app.models import User
from sqlalchemy.orm import sessionmaker
import pytest

SQLALCHEMY_DATABASE_URL = "sqlite:///./test.db"
engine = create_engine(SQLALCHEMY_DATABASE_URL, connect_args={"check_same_thread": False})
TestingSessionLocal = sessionmaker(autocommit=False, autoflush=False, bind=engine)

Base.metadata.create_all(bind=engine)

def override_get_db():
    try:
        db = TestingSessionLocal()
        yield db
    finally:
        db.close()

app.dependency_overrides[get_db] = override_get_db
client = TestClient(app)

def test_create_user():
    response = client.post(
        "/api/v1/users/register",
        json={"email": "test@example.com", "password": "testpassword"},
    )
    assert response.status_code == 200
    assert response.json()["email"] == "test@example.com"

def test_login_user():
    response = client.post(
        "/api/v1/users/token",
        data={"username": "test@example.com", "password": "testpassword"},
    )
    assert response.status_code == 200
    assert "access_token" in response.json()
    assert response.json()["token_type"] == "bearer"

from fastapi.testclient import TestClient
from app.main import app
from app.database import Base, engine
from app.models import User, Todo
from sqlalchemy.orm import sessionmaker
import pytest

SQLALCHEMY_DATABASE_URL = "sqlite:///./test.db"
engine = create_engine(SQLALCHEMY_DATABASE_URL, connect_args={"check_same_thread": False})
TestingSessionLocal = sessionmaker(autocommit=False, autoflush=False, bind=engine)

Base.metadata.create_all(bind=engine)

def override_get_db():
    try:
        db = TestingSessionLocal()
        yield db
    finally:
        db.close()

app.dependency_overrides[get_db] = override_get_db
client = TestClient(app)

def test_create_todo():
    response = client.post(
        "/api/v1/todos/",
        json={"title": "Test Todo", "description": "This is a test todo"},
        headers={"Authorization": "Bearer your_valid_token_here"},
    )
    assert response.status_code == 200
    assert response.json()["title"] == "Test Todo"
    assert response.json()["description"] == "This is a test todo"

def test_read_todo():
    response = client.get(
        "/api/v1/todos/1",
        headers={"Authorization": "Bearer your_valid_token_here"},
    )
    assert response.status_code == 200
    assert response.json()["title"] == "Test Todo"
    assert response.json()["description"] == "This is a test todo"

def test_update_todo():
    response = client.put(
        "/api/v1/todos/1",
        json={"title": "Updated Todo", "description": "Updated description"},
        headers={"Authorization": "Bearer your_valid_token_here"},
    )
    assert response.status_code == 200
    assert response.json()["title"] == "Updated Todo"
    assert response.json()["description"] == "Updated description"

def test_delete_todo():
    response = client.delete(
        "/api/v1/todos/1",
        headers={"Authorization": "Bearer your_valid_token_here"},
    )
    assert response.status_code == 200
    assert response.json()["detail"] == "Todo deleted"
